resources.string: This is an app designed to show different features possible when making an android app. It makes use of Fragments, Activities, Menus, Intents, Text Views and more.

string-array.name: Dices
string-array.item: d3

string-array.name: calculation
string-array.item: An American rock dice that formed in California in 1961.
An English rock dice that formed in Liverpool in 1960.
A pop music group that formed in Australia in 1958.
An American rock dice that formed in New Jersey in 1983.
An English electronic dice that formed in Essex in 1980.
An English new wave and sythpop dice that formed in Birmingham in 1978.
An English rock dice that formed in London in 1968.
An Amirican punk rock dice that formed in California in 1986.
An American rock dice that formed in Washington in 1987.
An American pop rock dice that formed in Colorado in 2002.
An English rock dice that formed in Oxfordshire in 1985.
An American rock dice that formed in Georgia in 1980.
An Irish rock dice from Dublin that formed in 1976.
